title: Dominated by fear 1
description:
在这个被鬼魂占领的世界里生存下去吧！
注意自己的身后👻
Survive in a world overrun by ghosts!
keep an eye on your back ！！！
body:
## 公告 ## 现二代整合包已经正式发布！此版本将不再更新！

Now the Gen 2 modpack has been released!This version will no longer be updated!

[Dominated by Fear 2：Containment Breach](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dominated-by-fear-2containment-breach) **本整合包禁止搬运，灵感源于雾中人视频！** **This modpack prohibits carrying, inspired by the Man in the Mist video！** ---
中文简介 **欢迎来到一个充满恐怖怪物的世界** 在这个整合包中，玩家将面对各种恐怖生物、险恶环境以及神秘事件，需要运用智慧和勇气来生存下去。探索荒芜的世界，挖掘隐藏的秘密，与怪物战斗，建造庇护所，并尽力保持自己的生存。 其中还添加了多人联机模组，快去和别人一起体验这个恐怖生存吧！ --- **>重要提示:** - **整合包兼容性:** 本整合包拥有与 OptiFine 相互冲突的模组，请不要随意添加。 - **健康限制:** 有心脏病或癫痫病史的人士不建议玩这个整合包。 - **制作和打包人员:** 由 Zirran 制作，HMCL/Prism 启动器打包。 - **仅支持客户端:** 本整合包仅支持客户端运行，暂不支持服务器。 ### **~~在游玩本整合包时，请注意自己的身后 👻。~~**
**Welcome to a World of Terrifying Monsters** In this bundle, players will be faced with a variety of terrifying creatures, treacherous environments, and mysterious events, requiring wisdom and courage to survive. Explore a deserted world, unearth hidden secrets, fight monsters, build shelters, and do your best to stay alive. Multiplayer mods have been added for those who dare to experience this terrifying survival with others! --- **>Important Notices:** - **Modpack Compatibility:** This modpack has modules that conflict with OptiFine, so please refrain from adding them randomly. - **Health Restrictions:** People with a history of heart disease or epilepsy are advised against playing this bundle. - **Creator and Packager:** Made by Zirran, packaged by Prism/HMCL Launcher. - **Language Option:** This modpack adds the Chinese texture pack, which players outside of the Chinese mainland can delete by themselves. - **Client Support Only:** This modpack only supports client running, not servers. ### **~~And remember, keep an eye on your back while playing 👻.~~**
